title: Update phone number to 8429145707 in footer

requirements.text: In the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx), update the contact phone number displayed in the footer contact section to '+91-8429145707'. This corresponds to the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/footer[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[4]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/p[1]. Also update any tel: href link associated with this phone number to 'tel:+918429145707'.
acceptanceCriteria: The footer contact section displays '+91-8429145707' as the phone number.
Any tel: anchor href in the footer is updated to 'tel:+918429145707'.
No other phone number instances elsewhere in the footer are left as the old number.

constraints: Only change the phone number in the footer contact section as identified by the provided XPath. Do not alter any other footer content.
nonGoals: Updating the WhatsApp button wa.me link phone number.
Updating phone numbers on any page other than the footer.
